description: Intent resolution (inline): inside an agent build; add a Slack tool, not a spawned wf.

priorConversation.text: Create an agent that reviews failed order payments, investigates the cause in Stripe and our order database, and proposes a fix.
I've set up the 'Payment recovery' agent. It can look up failed payments in Stripe, cross-check the order database, and propose a fix for each failure.

conversation.text: Also send a Slack when done.

intentExpectation.rationale: Inside an agent; add a Slack tool, not a spawned wf.
